curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Patch commit 547336ac73c8 is a merge commit with first parent 3f6fcab0c56b. Only one source file changed: core/src/plugins/sqlite3/db.go (+8/-5). The patch adds a strings.HasPrefix check in the DB function to verify the resolved database path starts with the default directory, and appends trailing slashes to default directory values. No sibling locations: other plugins (clickhouse, elasticsearch, mongodb, mysql, postgres, redis) connect to network databases and do not use file path joining. Vulnerability class path-traversal confirmed from CWE-22, advisory description, and patch diff. L1/L3 areas and L2/L3 descriptions rewritten per updated guidelines to ensure proper specificity graduation.
